summary: Frontend regression + refactor validation after AdminDashboard split, single apiFetch stack, react-hot-toast + ConfirmDialog rollout, save-button loader spinner, and mobile responsive orders panel. ALL test scenarios from the review request pass. Previous iteration_5 bugs (401 redirect dropping ?expired=1, and 'clone on Response' console error) are CONFIRMED FIXED.

minor.issue: Previous iteration reported a 500 for the archived session; current run shows the endpoint resolves and the Success page no longer needs the /orders/by-session fallback. Fallback code path therefore not exercised on the live order LL-20260605-4B5493, but the rendered output is correct (order number, items 'O poema e tu', total €36.00, cart cleared).

critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard refactor is clean: orchestrator ~150 lines, tabs split into ProductsTab/OrdersTab/ContactsTab, with shared constants.js — good DRY and maintainability gain.

api.js: single apiFetch is the only HTTP stack now (axios removed). 401 handler centralized via handleAdminUnauthorized + hard window.location.replace, AND AdminDashboard.verifyAuth now lets the global handler do the redirect — that's why the expired=1 banner finally shows. Good fix.

ConfirmDialog component is well-isolated with confirm-dialog / confirm-cancel / confirm-ok data-testids and click-outside-to-cancel via overlay. Used consistently for delete-product/order/contact actions.

ReplyModal uses field names reply-subject / reply-message / reply-attachments and submits multipart via apiFetch without manually setting Content-Type — browser sets the boundary correctly (verified by behavior; field name 'attachment' on FormData).
OrdersTab save button: spinner correctly toggles via savingId state, swaps Save icon for Loader with animate-spin and 'A guardar...' text — verified in-flight during real PATCH call.

success_rate.backend: n/a (frontend-only test against live Render API)

test_credentials: Admin: tmargaridarodrigues / weloveloveletters2026!admin (live Render). /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references old local admin/admin123 — main agent should sync it.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST contact via /api/contact (TEST AutoQA-Iter6 / qa-iter6@example.com) to exercise the reply modal and ConfirmDialog confirm-ok delete flow. CLEANED UP — deleted via the ConfirmDialog -> adminDeleteContact path at end of test (Mensagens list confirmed empty after).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor is solid; all previous bugs fixed. Archived order LL-20260605-4B5493 is still intact (Apagar dialog was opened then CANCELLED). Loader spinner test did click 'Guardar alterações' once on the archived order with its existing values — backend likely sent a notify_customer email as part of that save (expected per the original instructions; values were not modified). Reply modal field test ids: reply-subject, reply-message, reply-attachments, reply-submit. ConfirmDialog test ids: confirm-dialog, confirm-cancel, confirm-ok.

scenarios_tested.status: PASS — previously failing in iter5, now fixed

scenarios_tested.id: orders-tab Activas/Arquivadas toggle + LL-20260605-4B5493 + 'O poema e tu' (not 'Produto') + order-unarchive-<id>
contacts auto-poll ~25s (verified extra GET /api/admin/contacts after 28s wait)
success?session_id=valid -> renders order#, items, total €36.00, shipping; ll-cart cleared
public /contact -> new toast 'Recebemos a tua mensagem!'
ConfirmDialog replaces window.confirm for delete order (CANCEL only — archived order intact)
ConfirmDialog confirm-ok deletes test contact (verified cleanup)
Loader spinner shown while saving order ('A guardar...' + svg.animate-spin)
Mobile (375x800) orders row stacks flex-col + sm:flex-row
No 'clone on Response' console error on any admin flow
